title: Chandramouleshwara Temple, Unkal

overview.short: The Chandramauleshwara Temple, sometimes referred to as the Candramauḷĩśvara or Chandramouleshwara temple at Unkal, is an 11th-century Shiva temple with Chalukyan architecture in U
overview.description: The Chandramauleshwara Temple, sometimes referred to as the Candramauḷĩśvara or Chandramouleshwara temple at Unkal, is an 11th-century Shiva temple with Chalukyan architecture in Unkal (Hubballi), Karnataka, India. It is built on a square-cross plan with one entrance for each cardinal direction, corresponding to the sandhara plan found in Sanskrit texts on architecture. It originally had a Chaturmukha (four-faced) Linga in the center of the temple and many more mandapas (halls), but the surviving structure is much smaller. topPlaces.name: Kendriya Vidyalaya, Hubli
topPlaces.description: Kendriya Vidyalaya No.1 Rajnagar, Hubli is a school in Hubli, Karnataka, India, established in 1965 to provide primary and higher Secondary (10+2) education to the children of Central Government employees and also others of Hubli city. The school follows the syllabus of the Central Board of Secondary Education, New Delhi.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chandramouleshwara Temple, Unkal?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chandramouleshwara Temple, Unkal is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chandramouleshwara Temple, Unkal?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Hubli Airport (4 km) and the nearest railway station is Hubballi Junction (4 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chandramouleshwara Temple, Unkal?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chandramouleshwara Temple, Unkal at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chandramouleshwara Temple, Unkal?
faq.a: Stays in Chandramouleshwara Temple, Unkal start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chandramouleshwara Temple, Unkal?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kendriya Vidyalaya, Hubli, Hubli taluk, Hubli, Gopankop, Bengeri.
